notes: Seti Astro Suite Pro V1.11.8 Zooming works with mouse wheel or ctrl+mousewheel. Realtime Levels controls added in Layers.  V1.11.7  Secondary Dock Window for Panels. Starless temp stretch math improvements. K - Brightness option in Levels V1.11.6 Added Levels (histogram transform) tool. Most tool UI's also now persist with their geometry and placement when reopening them. V1.11.5 Additional updates to CC engine.  Blink Comparator update.  Syqon Starless CLI mode.  Easter Egg Mini Game updates.  Other UX updates. V1.11.4 Export FITS Bundles, Create and Edit tables, UX improvements. V1.11.3 Updated FITS table plot functions V1.11.2 Torch runtime installation error fix.  Additional fits tables options. V1.11.1 Massive speed improvements in Cosmic Clarity sharpen and denoise engines V1.11.0 New Syqon tools, under Smart Tools, for all current and future Syqon tools. FITS table update, now all science data and tables will be displayed in SASpro. Updated Hardware Acceleration installation with improved hardening, clearer instructions, etc.
